description: CompositionBlack shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with a mid arm button tab, yoked back, one pocket on left chest with a buttoned flap, stitch detailing, branding above the pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its spread collar is just asking to be paired with a cowboy style shoestring tie. The soft cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
